summary: All nine requirements (REQ-34 through REQ-42) are fully implemented. The diff shows: BASE_URL changed to https://fapi.binance.com in safeFetch.ts; fetchUniverse24h logs UNIVERSE_SOURCE and calls /fapi/v1/ticker/24hr; universeFilter.ts implements USDT-only filtering, USDC exclusion (case-insensitive), stable-to-stable pair exclusion, Number() volume parsing with NaN logging, debug logging events, and fallback logic returning top 5 symbols; UNIVERSE_SOURCE added to LogEventType union in store.ts; LogsTab.tsx renders UNIVERSE_SOURCE with default gray color. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.
